scope: Public-source tool references only. This file does not disclose NIS2COMPASS selection, deployment, access, integration, or pilot status.

modules.name: CYRESCUE
modules.plain_role: Preparedness, incident response, resilience, and controlled security validation.

modules.name: CYBERRA
modules.plain_role: Threat intelligence and risk analysis that help teams understand and respond to changing threats.

modules.name: CYBRITE
modules.plain_role: Monitoring, anomaly detection, and incident-response support across hosts and networks.

modules.name: CROSS-CORE
modules.plain_role: Secure cooperation, information exchange, and integrity checks for shared cyber information.

modules.name: CYBERWISE
modules.plain_role: Cybersecurity awareness, practical learning, and safer everyday behaviour.

modules.name: CYBERGOPLUS
modules.plain_role: Governance, policy, compliance, and automation that connect security work to reviewable controls.

tools.name: MISP
tools.purpose: Create, enrich, correlate, and share structured cyber-threat intelligence.
tools.relationship: Named in the public CYberSynchrony threat-intelligence deliverable. No NIS2COMPASS deployment or federation status is claimed.

tools.name: Wazuh
tools.purpose: Collect and correlate endpoint and system security events for monitoring and investigation.
tools.relationship: Named in the public CYberSynchrony integrated monitoring deliverable. No NIS2COMPASS deployment or integration status is claimed.
tools.license_id: GPL-2.0-only for the server; companion components have their own licences

tools.name: Suricata
tools.purpose: Inspect network traffic and produce security alerts using an open-source detection engine.
tools.relationship: Named in the public CYberSynchrony integrated monitoring deliverable. No NIS2COMPASS sensor placement or pilot use is claimed.

tools.name: WEKA
tools.purpose: Explore machine-learning methods for classification, clustering, and anomaly analysis with reviewable datasets.
tools.relationship: Named in public CYberSynchrony framework and monitoring deliverables. No NIS2COMPASS model performance or production use is claimed.
tools.license_id: GPL-3.0-only for current 3.8 and 3.9 release lines

tools.name: Apache Caldera
tools.purpose: Support controlled adversary-emulation research and defensive validation in isolated, authorized environments.
tools.relationship: Independent upstream research reference relevant to CYRESCUE's public validation role. It is not presented as a CYberSynchrony-supplied component or confirmed NIS2COMPASS integration.

tools.name: Snyk CLI and service
tools.purpose: Analyze software dependencies and source projects through an authenticated vendor service and public CLI.
tools.relationship: Snyk is named in a public CYberSynchrony integration deliverable. NIS2COMPASS does not publish a module assignment, selection status, entitlement, or integration claim.
tools.license_id: Apache-2.0 for the public CLI source; vendor service terms also apply
